source_files.filename: BetBoom Битва Чемпионов_ Cплит #4 _ Очки и Расписание.xlsx

metadata.notes: Schema-valid draft for ten tile-grid record sets across five schedule sheets. Europe/Moscow is provisional because the workbook contains no explicit timezone label. Thirty-seven non-division matches contain one or more unpublished participant slots; 72 participant fields use explicit TBD fallbacks. The draft is not runtime-verified.
